info.description: Log of KPI threshold breaches that require managerial attention.

title.description: Short name, usually the KPI that breached (e.g., Productivity Breach).

description.description: Detailed message describing the breach (e.g., 'Aswan branch productivity has fallen below the critical threshold').

severity.description: The severity level based on the Alert Rule.

category.description: General categorization of the alert (e.g., Operational, Financial, HR).

kpiName.description: The KPI metric that triggered the alert (e.g., Productivity, On-Time Delivery).

triggeredByRule.description: The specific rule configuration that triggered this alert event (UC13/UC15 output).

currentValue.description: The KPI value recorded at the moment the alert was triggered (e.g., 65%).

threshold.description: The threshold value from the rule at the moment the alert was triggered (e.g., 70%).

isResolved.description: Indicates if the alert has been dismissed by a manager.

resolvedAt.description: Timestamp when the alert was resolved/dismissed.
